title: Multi-tissue molecular QTL analyses in major depressive disorder
description: Analysis code accompanying a multi-tissue molecular-QTL study prioritizing candidate genes for major depressive disorder and evaluating circulating inflammatory proteins under cis-instrument, multiple-testing and colocalization criteria.
